action.reasoning: Observation: Last iteration's fix_mask with var<0.005 was too aggressive (~45 features masked), losing positive R² contributions from features 51-58 and 80-95. The current model from iter 13 (35 epochs) needs proper masking to evaluate. Analysis: Features 60-79 have var=0 (meaningless R²), must be masked. Features 80-87 have var 0.000001-0.000698 - risky but might contribute positively. Features 51-58 (ptend_t upper) have var 0.002-0.003 with R² 0.31-0.49 - should keep. Using var<0.001 threshold masks features 60-87 (~28 features) plus any with R²<0, which is a balanced approach between iter 4's 20 masks (got 0.5206) and the over-aggressive 45 masks. Decision: Update fix_mask with var<0.001 OR R²<0, run it, submit eval immediately to get baseline with current model.
